title: Trump vs Pope Leo XIV: Clash of titans, dividing of Catholics
shortDescription: President Trump's religious posturing and rocky relationship with Pope Leo threaten to alienate his Catholic supporters.

title: 'Beyond madness': MAGA pundits question Trump's mental health

title: Make America Safe Again? Prosecutors are departing DOJ under Trump
shortDescription: The exit of thousands of DOJ lawyers weakens law enforcement for many years to come, former DOJ lawyers told USA TODAY.

title: Proposal to single out 'Trump' name at Ohio wildlife area causes stir
shortDescription: The Charles O. Trump Wildlife Area has no ties to President Donald Trump. The preserve is named after a late farmer who donated the land to the state.

title: Regime change? A military takeover? Trump's thorny Cuba options
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's options on Cuba — from a military operation to an economic deal to doing nothing at all — are politically fraught.

title: Trump signs order on psychedelic drug research after Joe Rogan call
shortDescription: The executive order signed by President Donald Trump aims to accelerate research into psychedelic drugs to help veterans.

title: Pope says ‘not in my interest’ to debate Trump
shortDescription: Pope Leo downplayed his feud with President Trump, saying that reporting about his commentary "has not been accurate in all its aspects."

title: Trump signs psychedelic drug executive order with Joe Rogan
shortDescription: Podcaster Joe Rogan joined President Trump in the Oval Office as he signed an executive order intended to accelerate research for psychedelic drugs.

title: Pope Leo says 'tyrants' remark wasn't in response to Trump feud
shortDescription: Pope Leo XIV said it is "not in my interest" to "debate" President Donald Trump. Leo has criticized conflict in Iran, sparking backlash from Trump.

title: Trump says 'very good conversations' with Iran, Strait of Hormuz closed
shortDescription: Iran moved to close the critical waterway, again, after President Trump announced he would not call off the blockade.

title: Trump touts 'incredible' tax cuts. But 70% of US says taxes still too high

title: In a Congress led by men, women are flexing their power to fight abuse
shortDescription: From voting to release the Epstein files to forcing out two congressmen, female lawmakers keep overpowering the men in charge of Congress.

title: Trump: Pentagon UFO study will soon release 'very interesting' finds
shortDescription: Trump said the Pentagon review of UFO-related documents found 'many very interesting' records that would be released 'very, very soon.'

title: Trump to begin releasing UFO files
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said at a Turning Point USA event that his administration will begin releasing government files relating to UFOs.

title: Trump speaks in Arizona for Turning Point's 'Build the Red Wall' event
shortDescription: President Donald Trump returned to Phoenix to speak at Turning Point USA's "Build the Red Wall" event at Dream City Church, ahead of this year's midterm elections.

title: President's Trump Tower penthouse could be subject to new NYC tax

shortDescription: Trump, a former New York real estate mogul, grew up in the posh, suburban Queens neighborhood of Jamaica Estates.

shortDescription: At a tax roundtable in Nevada, President Donald Trump claimed he's never heard of the term "corner store," sparking disbelief online.

title: RFK on Trump: ‘He is very, very sane’
shortDescription: HHS Sec. Robert F. Kennedy Jr. responded that President Trump is "very, very sane" when questioned on a number of the president's Truth Social posts.

title: Trump stops Catholic Charities 'Pedro Pan' funding. What the money did
